description: As an agricultural meteorologist evaluating regional drought conditions, you need to model crop canopy moisture by finding the correlation between vegetation vigor (NDVI) and water absorption (SWIR1 band) using the multi-spectral Landsat image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Create a new band named 'ndvi' using the formula (band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3), where band_1 is SWIR1, band_2 is NIR, and band_3 is Red. Perform a correlative plot analysis and compute the linear regression with 'ndvi' as the X-axis and 'band_1' as the Y-axis. Export the visual plot image to /home/ga/snap_exports/ndvi_swir_plot.png, the statistical regression data to /home/ga/snap_exports/ndvi_swir_stats.txt, and save the modified product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/drought_analysis.dim.
